message:
style(pty_harness): Apply additional clippy lints

Continue clippy cleanup in PTY harness tests:

- Replace `.map().unwrap_or()` with `.map_or()` idiom (3 instances)
- Use inline format strings consistently
- Extract row0.trim() to avoid repeated calls
- Replace `row0.trim() != ""` with `!row0_trimmed.is_empty()`
- Replace `row0.trim().len() > 0` with `!row0_trimmed.is_empty()`

These are follow-up fixes from the clippy -D warnings task (bd-2upc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
